# Generated by tools/m9_diplomacy.py --write; M9 ancient subject contracts.
# M3's sourced dependency ledger selects the start adapters below.
# Timed availability is rendered only from AntqDate-validated values.

antq_client_kingdom = {
	subject_pays = subject_pays_vassal
	color = subject_vassal
	level = 1
	counts_as_external = yes
	visible = { scope:target = { subject_type_is_not_locked = yes } }
	creation_visible = { always = yes }
	join_defensive_wars_always = { always = yes }
	join_offensive_wars_can_call = { scope:actor ?= { is_subject_of = scope:recipient } }
	has_overlords_ruler = no
	will_join_independence_wars = yes
	overlord_can_cancel = yes
	can_be_annexed = no
	has_limited_diplomacy = no
	allow_declaring_wars = { always = yes }
	can_change_rank = yes
	can_change_heir_selection = yes
	diplomatic_capacity_cost_scale = 0.35
	institution_spread_to_overlord = monthly_institution_spread_weak
	institution_spread_to_subject = monthly_institution_spread_weak
	overlord_modifier = { monthly_prestige = 0.01 }
}

	subject_pays = subject_pays_tributary
	color = subject_tributary
	level = 0
	counts_as_external = yes
	visible = { scope:target = { subject_type_is_not_locked = yes } }
	creation_visible = { always = yes }
	join_defensive_wars_always = { always = yes }

	will_join_independence_wars = yes
	subject_can_cancel = yes
	overlord_can_cancel = yes

	can_change_rank = yes
	can_change_heir_selection = yes

	overlord_protects_external = no

antq_foederati = {
	subject_pays = subject_pays_vassal
	color = subject_vassal
	level = 1
	counts_as_external = no
	visible = { current_date >= 382.1.1 scope:target = { subject_type_is_not_locked = yes } }
	creation_visible = { current_date >= 382.1.1 }
	join_defensive_wars_always = { always = yes }
	join_offensive_wars_can_call = { scope:actor ?= { is_subject_of = scope:recipient } }
	has_overlords_ruler = no
	will_join_independence_wars = yes
	overlord_can_cancel = yes
	can_be_annexed = no
	has_limited_diplomacy = no
	allow_declaring_wars = { always = yes }
	can_change_rank = yes
	can_change_heir_selection = yes
	diplomatic_capacity_cost_scale = 0.30
	subject_modifier = { country_cabinet_efficiency = -0.05 }
}

	subject_pays = subject_pays_tributary
	color = subject_tributary
	level = 0
	counts_as_external = yes
	visible = { scope:target = { subject_type_is_not_locked = yes } }
	creation_visible = { always = yes }
	join_defensive_wars_always = { always = yes }

	will_join_independence_wars = yes

	overlord_can_cancel = yes
